archived.description: `DELETE` operation will set this field to `true`
archived.title: Archived

patient.description: ID of the patient the document concerns
patient.title: Patient

doctor.description: ID of the doctor who owns the document
doctor.title: Doctor

metatags.description: Array of tags represented as string. This should be quoted--e.g. `'["a", "b"]'`--since this endpoint requires `multipart/form-data` encoding
metatags.title: Metatags

document.description: When creating, if you receive response as 201, but this field is `null`, please send a `GET` request with the created object's ID to retrieve the updated file URL
document.title: Document
